title: pelargonium × irregulare
intro: Pelargonium × irregulare, also known as Rose Geranium or Pelargonium roseum, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium graveolens. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × irregulare include reducing stress and anxiety, relieving digestive issues, and promoting a good night's sleep, among others. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which are used in aromatherapy, skincare, and traditional medicine.
